title: Crispy Canadian Ikura Bake
description: A floral and shattering post-workout Canadian dish featuring ikura, wood-fired-bake, and halal-friendly ingredients, served in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the banana leaves and cut them into 6-inch squares.
In a bowl, mix together ikura, olive oil, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Spoon the ikura mixture onto the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaves over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Place the banana leaf packets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the packets in the preheated wood-fired oven for 12 minutes, or until the banana leaves are crispy and slightly charred.
Remove the packets from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Crispy Canadian Ikura Bake hot, garnished with additional sesame seeds and soy sauce if desired.
